data.name: Header_Subtitle
data.value: Create a new passkey with PRF support

data.name: Alert_PrfNotSupported
data.value: The WebAuthn PRF extension is not supported on this device or browser. CryptoSync requires PRF.

data.name: Field_DisplayNameHelper
data.value: A friendly name for this passkey

data.name: Error_Register_REGISTRATION_FAILED
data.value: Passkey registration failed. Please try again.

data.name: Error_Register_KEY_DERIVATION_FAILED
data.value: The passkey was created but key derivation failed. Please try again or register another passkey.

data.name: Error_Register_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: WebAuthn is not supported on this device or browser.

data.name: Error_Register_PRF_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: This authenticator does not support the WebAuthn PRF extension. Use a different passkey or device.

data.name: Error_Register_INVALID_DATA
data.value: Registration data is invalid or corrupted.
